text: Mora oa ka ( ea dilemo di tsheletseng) o na le lefito le leholo, le thata lesapong la hae la mastoid. E lebile tlhorong ea lesapo.
hypothesis: morago wa ka ya dilemo di tshiletseng o na le lefeto le legolo le thata lesapong la haela mastoid e lebile tlhogong ya lesapo

text: Mahloko a boletsweng a etsahala haho sena kgathatseho ho hang hantse ke etsa tse tlwaelehileng bo fihla bo otla.
hypothesis: mahloko a boletšweng a etša hala ga go sena kgathatšego go hang gantši ke tšatše e tlwaelegileng bofihla bo otla

text: Hangata, ho molemo ho tshela leqhwa ka metsotso e ka bang leshome le metso e mehlano hora enngwe le enngwe ho fihlela sebaka sa ho ruruha le bohloko bo saka mme bohloko bo fokotseha.
hypothesis: ga ngata go molemo go tshela lekgo ka metsotso e ka bang lešomele metso e mehlano go raya e nngwe le e nngwe go fihlela sebaka sa go ruruwa le bohloko bo saka mme bohloko bo fokotsega
